## Summary

Describe the feature or example.

## Use Case

Explain the general instrument-control or spectrum-processing workflow it helps.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired API, command, or documentation change.

## Notes

Keep requests generic and avoid private lab workflows or unpublished analysis.
